title: Data-driven surrogate material model for the mechanical simulation of additively manufactured architected weaves
abstract: • A fast surrogate material model for architected AM weaves is presented. • The training data is created using an automated labeling process. • The labeling finds the weaves’ internal forces using full-field displacement tests. • The results show a mean accuracy of above 90% for both normalized load and shape. Additively Manufacturing (AM) textiles enables the fabrication of architected structures that have tuned local mechanical properties to customize their design, e.g. , for personalization to the human body. For the inverse design of architected AM textiles, creating a computationally efficient mechanical simulation is still a major challenge. Continuum mechanics approaches lose their inherent simulation speed for the high element count that is required to simulate spatially varying designs and yarn-level behavior. Truss-based textile simulations typically have a low simulation time and high adaptivity, but the complexity of textile mechanics is challenging to model using simple truss elements. In this paper, we model weave structures as planar trusses with truss elements that have variable stiffness depending on strain, textile shear and textile design. We present an automated framework to evaluate the correlation between textile design, textile deformation and textile mechanics on a truss member level. This correlation is modeled using a discrete constitutive manifold, whose datapoints represent an empirical surrogate for traditional constitutive models. A design-sensitive surrogate material model formulated as an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) is trained on the constitutive manifold and is validated by evaluating the simulation accuracy of textile samples that vary their weave direction. The results show the capability of the ANN to simulate AM weaves with spatially varying designs on the order of seconds. This paves the way towards an efficient inverse design of architected AM textiles.
topics: Innovations in Concrete and Construction Materials
title_cn: 基于数据驱动的代理材料模型用于增材制造架构编织物的机械仿真
abstract_cn:
• 提出了一个用于架构增材制造（AM）织物的快速代理材料模型。  
• 训练数据通过自动标记过程生成。  
• 标记过程通过全场位移测试找出织物的内部力。  
• 结果显示，归一化载荷和形状的平均准确率均超过90%。  

增材制造（AM）纺织品使得能够制造具有调谐局部机械性能的架构结构，以定制其设计，例如，适应人体的个性化需求。对于架构增材制造纺织品的逆向设计，创建一个计算效率高的机械仿真仍然是一个主要挑战。连续介质力学方法在需要模拟空间变化设计和纱线级行为的高单元数时，失去了其固有的仿真速度。基于桁架的纺织仿真通常具有较低的仿真时间和较高的适应性，但使用简单的桁架元素建模纺织力学的复杂性是一个挑战。在本文中，我们将织物结构建模为平面桁架，桁架元素的刚度根据应变、纺织剪切和纺织设计而变化。我们提出了一个自动化框架，以评估纺织设计、纺织变形和纺织力学在桁架构件级别之间的相关性。该相关性使用离散本构流形建模，其数据点代表传统本构模型的经验代理。我们构建了一个对设计敏感的代理材料模型，形式为人工神经网络（ANN），并在本构流形上进行训练，通过评估不同织造方向的纺织样本的仿真准确性进行验证。结果表明，ANN能够在几秒钟内模拟具有空间变化设计的增材制造织物。这为架构增材制造纺织品的高效逆向设计铺平了道路。

title: Cost-related compensation events under the conditions of contracts of the Public Procurement (Amendment) Act, 2016 (Act 914) for construction works in Ghana
abstract: Purpose The study aimed to identify and assess cost-related compensation events from the perspective of consultants, clients, and contractors. It measured the views of the tripartite on cost compensation events encountered during construction works and its subsequent effect on their project delivery. Design/methodology/approach A quantitative research approach was utilised, employing purposive sampling to select respondents. Twenty-five compensation events were identified in the literature, enumerated, and rigorously tested. The events were prioritised based on their significance, using the relative importance index. Factor analysis was employed to identify the common underlying factors among the variables. Findings The identified compensation events include inexperience, insufficient communication, and clients lacking a technical background. These are considered the most significant. The key common factors of compensation events discovered in the reduction study were Cost-Benefit to Stakeholders, Additional Works, and Technical Errors. Originality/value This paper makes a unique contribution to construction management literature by presenting an empirical and context-specific analysis of the impact of cost compensation events on overall project delivery costs. The study also provides significant insights for project stakeholders by emphasising the importance of proactive cost event identification, prompt notification, and comprehensive documentation in alleviating cost shocks.
title_cn: 根据2016年公共采购（修订）法（法案914）合同条件下，关于加纳建筑工程的成本相关补偿事件
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在从顾问、客户和承包商的角度识别和评估与成本相关的补偿事件。研究测量了三方在施工过程中遇到的成本补偿事件的看法及其对项目交付的后续影响。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究采用定量研究方法，使用目的性抽样选择受访者。文献中识别出25个补偿事件，并进行了详细列举和严格测试。这些事件根据其重要性进行了优先排序，使用相对重要性指数进行评估。采用因子分析法识别变量之间的共同潜在因素。 研究结果 识别出的补偿事件包括缺乏经验、沟通不足以及客户缺乏技术背景。这些被认为是最重要的。研究中发现的补偿事件的主要共同因素包括利益相关者的成本效益、额外工作和技术错误。 原创性/价值 本文通过呈现成本补偿事件对整体项目交付成本影响的实证和特定背景分析，为建筑管理文献做出了独特贡献。研究还通过强调主动识别成本事件、及时通知和全面文档的重要性，为项目利益相关者提供了重要见解，以减轻成本冲击。

title: Individual variability in lumbar muscle activation with passive back-support exoskeletons: an EMG study of experienced construction workers
abstract: Purpose While back-support exoskeletons (BSE) have shown promise in laboratory studies during repetitive tasks, their effectiveness during realistic construction tasks with experienced workers remains poorly understood. This study evaluates the effectiveness of two commercially available BSE designs in reducing lumbar muscle activation during actual simulated masonry work and examines individual response variability among construction workers. Design/methodology/approach Twenty-three experienced masons performed standardized masonry activities involving concrete masonry units under three conditions simulated in a laboratory environment: no exoskeleton (baseline), HAPO exoskeleton and BISKO exoskeleton. Surface electromyography (sEMG) measured bilateral lumbar erector spinae (LES) muscle activation. Statistical analysis compared muscle activation changes between conditions and characterized individual worker responses using within-subject comparisons and group-level testing. Findings HAPO demonstrated superior effectiveness, achieving mean reductions of 10.0% (right LES) and 11.5% (left LES) in muscle activation, compared to BISKO's 3.4% and 7.0% reductions, respectively. However, individual responses varied substantially, ranging from 50% reductions to increased activation in some workers. Both exoskeletons showed consistently better performance for left LES compared to right LES, indicating significant bilateral asymmetry. Statistical analysis revealed that individual worker characteristics and established movement patterns from years of experience significantly influenced exoskeleton effectiveness. Originality/value This study addresses critical gaps by evaluating exoskeletons with real construction workers performing realistic masonry tasks, rather than laboratory volunteers with simplified activities. The comprehensive analysis of individual response variability challenges universal effectiveness assumptions and demonstrates that experienced workers' established movement patterns critically influence intervention outcomes. Results provide evidence for individualized implementation strategies rather than universal deployment approaches in occupational settings.
title_cn: 被动背部支撑外骨骼下腰部肌肉激活的个体差异：一项针对经验丰富的建筑工人的肌电图研究
abstract_cn: 目的 尽管背部支撑外骨骼（BSE）在实验室研究中的重复性任务中显示出良好的前景，但其在实际施工任务中对经验丰富的工人的有效性仍然不甚了解。本研究评估了两种市售BSE设计在实际模拟砌砖工作中减少腰部肌肉激活的有效性，并考察了建筑工人之间的个体反应差异。 设计/方法 23名经验丰富的砌砖工人在实验室环境中进行标准化的砌砖活动，涉及混凝土砌块，在三种条件下进行模拟：无外骨骼（基线）、HAPO外骨骼和BISKO外骨骼。使用表面肌电图（sEMG）测量双侧腰部竖脊肌（LES）肌肉激活。统计分析比较了不同条件下肌肉激活的变化，并通过组内比较和组级测试对个体工人的反应进行了特征化。 结果 HAPO外骨骼表现出更优的有效性，右侧LES和左侧LES的肌肉激活平均分别减少了10.0%和11.5%，而BISKO外骨骼的减少幅度分别为3.4%和7.0%。然而，个体反应差异显著，从50%的减少到某些工人的激活增加不等。两种外骨骼在左侧LES的表现均优于右侧LES，表明存在显著的双侧不对称性。统计分析显示，个体工人的特征和多年经验所形成的运动模式显著影响外骨骼的有效性。 原创性/价值 本研究通过评估真实建筑工人在执行实际砌砖任务时的外骨骼，填补了重要的研究空白，而非仅依赖于进行简化活动的实验室志愿者。对个体反应差异的全面分析挑战了普遍有效性的假设，并表明经验丰富工人所建立的运动模式对干预结果有重要影响。研究结果为职业环境中个性化实施策略提供了证据，而非普遍适用的部署方法。

title: Hierarchical clustering of factors causing site clearance bottlenecks in ODA-funded salinity intrusion mitigation infrastructure projects
abstract: Purpose Numerous infrastructure projects have been launched to address the challenges posed by climate change. In Vietnam, these projects are primarily financed through Official Development Assistance (ODA) funding. However, during implementation, site clearance bottlenecks (SCBs) arise as major obstacles, undermining project efficiency and eroding national credibility. Design/methodology/approach This study identified 22 potential SCB factors through literature review and expert consultation, and surveyed 140 stakeholders using a structured questionnaire. The principal analysis tools were Cronbach's alpha, the Kruskal-Wallis test, hierarchical clustering, and mean-based assessment modeling. Findings Analysis results revealed financial issues, compensation prices, support policies, and document approvals as the most critical factors. There was strong consensus across many SCB factors, with both “financial constraints” and “unstable market conditions” consistently ranked by all stakeholder groups. Hierarchical clustering classified the 22 factors into four reliable groups, descendingly ranked in importance as: “financial and resettlement pressures”, “compensation and policy issues”, “institutional and administrative constraints”, and “procedural and contextual challenges”. Research limitations/implications The findings provide empirical evidence for understanding the dynamics of SCBs and establish a foundation for prioritizing SCB factors in infrastructure projects. Practical implications This study proposes practical strategies to reduce site clearance delays and improve the implementation efficiency of ODA-funded infrastructure projects. Originality/value This study makes a novel contribution by revealing project stakeholders' perceptions of key factors and introducing a validated clustering-based approach for assessing SCBs in ODA-funded public infrastructure projects aimed at salinity intrusion mitigation.
title_cn: ODA资助的盐碱入侵缓解基础设施项目中导致场地清理瓶颈的因素的层次聚类分析
abstract_cn: 目的 许多基础设施项目已启动，以应对气候变化带来的挑战。在越南，这些项目主要通过官方发展援助（ODA）资金进行融资。然而，在实施过程中，场地清理瓶颈（SCBs）作为主要障碍出现，削弱了项目效率并侵蚀了国家信誉。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究通过文献回顾和专家咨询识别了22个潜在的SCB因素，并使用结构化问卷对140名利益相关者进行了调查。主要分析工具包括Cronbach's alpha、Kruskal-Wallis检验、层次聚类和基于均值的评估建模。 结果分析结果显示，财务问题、赔偿价格、支持政策和文件审批是最关键的因素。许多SCB因素之间达成了强烈共识，其中“财务限制”和“市场条件不稳定”在所有利益相关者群体中始终被一致排名。层次聚类将22个因素分类为四个可靠的组，按重要性递减排名为：“财务和安置压力”、“赔偿和政策问题”、“制度和行政限制”以及“程序和背景挑战”。 研究局限性/影响 研究结果为理解SCBs的动态提供了实证证据，并为在基础设施项目中优先考虑SCB因素奠定了基础。 实际意义 本研究提出了减少场地清理延误和提高ODA资助基础设施项目实施效率的实用策略。 独创性/价值 本研究通过揭示项目利益相关者对关键因素的看法，并引入一种经过验证的基于聚类的方法来评估旨在缓解盐碱入侵的ODA资助公共基础设施项目中的SCBs，做出了新颖的贡献。

title: Linking cognitive distraction to construction workers’ unsafe behaviors: the role of hazard perception and cognitive load
abstract: Purpose Cognitive distraction has been widely recognized as a contributor to unsafe behavior, yet its underlying mechanisms among construction workers remain insufficiently understood. To fill this gap, this study examined the effect of cognitive distraction on construction workers’ unsafe behaviors by exploring the mediating role of hazard perception and the moderating role of cognitive load. Design/methodology/approach We collected 324 valid questionnaires from frontline construction workers using a multi-wave survey research design. Structural equation modeling and hierarchical regression analysis were utilized to analyze the data. Findings The findings revealed that: (1) cognitive distraction was positively associated with unsafe behavior, (2) hazard perception mediated the relationship between cognitive distraction and unsafe behavior, (3) cognitive load amplified the detrimental effect of cognitive distraction on unsafe behavior (β = 0.211, p &lt; 0.001). It also significantly strengthened the protective effect of hazard perception against unsafe behavior (β = −2.384, p &lt; 0.001), suggesting a risk compensation effect, and (4) Multi-group analysis further revealed that cognitive distraction more strongly increased unsafe behaviors among older and more experienced workers, whereas hazard perception played a stronger protective role in these groups. Originality/value The primary theoretical contribution of this work lies in elucidating the mechanism and boundary conditions of how cognitive distraction influences unsafe behavior by incorporating hazard perception and cognitive load as critical factors. Practically, the results offer clear implications for safety management. Under high cognitive load, minimizing distractions or enhancing workers’ hazard perception can significantly reduce the risk of unsafe behavior.
title_cn: 将认知干扰与建筑工人的不安全行为联系起来：危险感知和认知负荷的作用
abstract_cn: 目的 认知干扰被广泛认为是导致不安全行为的一个因素，但在建筑工人中其潜在机制仍然不够清楚。为填补这一空白，本研究通过探讨危险感知的中介作用和认知负荷的调节作用，考察了认知干扰对建筑工人不安全行为的影响。 设计/方法论/途径 我们通过多波次调查研究设计，从一线建筑工人中收集了324份有效问卷。采用结构方程模型和分层回归分析对数据进行了分析。 发现 研究结果显示：(1) 认知干扰与不安全行为呈正相关；(2) 危险感知在认知干扰与不安全行为之间起到了中介作用；(3) 认知负荷加剧了认知干扰对不安全行为的负面影响（β = 0.211, p < 0.001）。它还显著增强了危险感知对不安全行为的保护作用（β = −2.384, p < 0.001），表明存在风险补偿效应；(4) 多组分析进一步揭示，认知干扰在年长和经验丰富的工人中更强烈地增加了不安全行为，而在这些群体中，危险感知发挥了更强的保护作用。 原创性/价值 本研究的主要理论贡献在于阐明了认知干扰如何影响不安全行为的机制及其边界条件，结合了危险感知和认知负荷作为关键因素。从实践角度来看，研究结果为安全管理提供了明确的启示。在高认知负荷下，减少干扰或增强工人的危险感知可以显著降低不安全行为的风险。

title: Developing an integrated framework for post-occupancy housing quality evaluation in mass housing: a user-centered IPA–gap–Kano approach
abstract: Purpose Despite the global rise in mass housing developments, their quality often remains inadequate. This is largely attributed to the neglect of the multidimensional nature of housing quality and the lack of alignment with user expectations. This study develops a comprehensive framework for evaluating mass housing quality at the post-occupancy stage, centered on resident perspectives. Design/methodology/approach A hybrid methodology combining importance–performance analysis (IPA), gap analysis and the Kano model is employed within a post-occupancy evaluation (POE) framework. Data were collected from 143 residents of a mass housing project in Pardis City, Iran, via structured questionnaires assessing 121 indicators across eight dimensions: functionality, form and aesthetics, comfort and performance, sustainability, site, location, service product, and construction and services. Findings The results revealed 64 underperforming indicators, including 20 critical dissatisfaction drivers such as poor security, unsafe streets, noise pollution and inflexible layouts. Four core dimensions – functionality, comfort and performance, site, and location – were key to reducing dissatisfaction, while others mainly enhanced satisfaction. A four-level improvement strategy was proposed to guide interventions within budget limits. Originality/value This study introduces a novel “Service Product” dimension to capture tangible post-occupancy deliverables, bridging service and product quality. Unlike earlier studies, it demonstrates that poor performance does not always equate to dissatisfaction, highlighting the need to distinguish between satisfaction and dissatisfaction drivers. The framework systematically centers on user expectations, offering a psychologically grounded approach to understanding residential (dis)satisfaction.
title_cn: 开发一个集成框架用于大规模住房的后占用住房质量评估：一种以用户为中心的IPA–差距–Kano方法
abstract_cn: 目的 尽管全球范围内大规模住房开发不断增加，但其质量往往仍然不足。这在很大程度上归因于对住房质量多维特性的忽视以及与用户期望的不一致。本研究开发了一个全面的框架，用于在后占用阶段评估大规模住房质量，重点关注居民的视角。 设计/方法论/方法 在后占用评估（POE）框架内，采用了一种结合重要性-表现分析（IPA）、差距分析和Kano模型的混合方法。通过结构化问卷从伊朗帕尔迪斯市的一项大规模住房项目的143名居民收集数据，评估121个指标，涵盖八个维度：功能性、形式与美学、舒适性与性能、可持续性、场地、位置、服务产品以及建筑与服务。 发现 结果显示有64个表现不佳的指标，其中包括20个关键的不满驱动因素，如安全性差、不安全的街道、噪音污染和不灵活的布局。四个核心维度——功能性、舒适性与性能、场地和位置——是减少不满的关键，而其他维度主要增强满意度。提出了一种四级改进策略，以指导在预算限制内的干预。 原创性/价值 本研究引入了一个新颖的“服务产品”维度，以捕捉有形的后占用交付成果，架起了服务与产品质量之间的桥梁。与早期研究不同，它表明表现不佳并不总是等同于不满，强调了区分满意和不满意驱动因素的必要性。该框架系统地围绕用户期望展开，提供了一种心理学基础的方法来理解居民的（不）满意度。

title: Risk transmission and control in the prefabricated construction multi-project supply chain network: a SIS modeling approach
abstract: Purpose The prefabricated construction supply chain (PCSC) is vulnerable to disruption from unforeseen events due to the precise coordination and transportation demands among various sections. This study aims to develop a prefabricated construction multi-project supply chain (PCMSC) risk transmission model to simulate and explain the mechanism of risk transmission in PCMSC. Design/methodology/approach This study constructs a complex network based on contract data of prefabricated construction (PC) projects from a well-known Chinese real estate development company. Four indicators – dependence level, resistance capacity, adaptation capacity and resilience – are incorporated into the SIS model to better adapt to the characteristics of PCSC. When unforeseen events occur, risk transmission paths in PCMSC can be simulated, and suppliers with potential risks can be identified. Findings The premise for risk transmission between projects is to have a common supplier. A high supplier localization rate can mitigate the risk of cross-regional transmission. A strong strategic partner can effectively defend against risk transmission from other areas. Moreover, improving enterprise resilience can effectively control risk transmission. Originality/value This study provides theoretical guidance for the holistic and dynamic analysis of risk transmission in the PCMSC. Meanwhile, this study develops an application framework of the epidemic model for supply chain management research, with specific adaptation to the characteristics of PCMSC and validation in practical case scenarios. In practice, PC project owners can apply the model for risk monitoring and control both in regular production and in unforeseen events.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 预制建筑多项目供应链网络中的风险传递与控制：一种SIS建模方法
abstract_cn: 目的 预制建筑供应链（PCSC）由于各个环节之间对精确协调和运输的高要求，容易受到突发事件的干扰。本研究旨在开发一个预制建筑多项目供应链（PCMSC）风险传递模型，以模拟和解释PCMSC中风险传递的机制。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究基于一家知名中国房地产开发公司的预制建筑（PC）项目合同数据构建了一个复杂网络。将依赖水平、抵抗能力、适应能力和韧性四个指标纳入SIS模型，以更好地适应PCSC的特征。当突发事件发生时，可以模拟PCMSC中的风险传递路径，并识别出具有潜在风险的供应商。 发现 项目之间风险传递的前提是拥有共同的供应商。高供应商本地化率可以减轻跨区域传递的风险。强大的战略合作伙伴能够有效抵御来自其他地区的风险传递。此外，提高企业韧性可以有效控制风险传递。 原创性/价值 本研究为PCMSC中风险传递的整体和动态分析提供了理论指导。同时，本研究开发了一个适用于供应链管理研究的流行病模型应用框架，具体适应PCMSC的特征并在实际案例场景中进行了验证。在实践中，PC项目业主可以应用该模型进行常规生产和突发事件下的风险监测与控制。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Exploring Digital–Real Integration in the Construction Industry: Driving Force of Digital Technology Innovation Network Embedding
title_cn: 探索建筑行业中的数字与现实整合：数字技术创新网络嵌入的驱动力

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Investigating the Causes and Their Interactions Leading to Supply Chain Risks in Prefabricated Construction: Configuration Perspective
abstract: The additional stakeholders and production environments within the networked supply chains of prefabricated construction (PC) have aggravated multiple causes of supply chain risks (SCRs) and their complex interactions. However, existing research primarily focused on risk identification and assessment, with limited exploration of how SCRs are generated by these causes and their interactions in different configurations. This study develops a hybrid method to investigate the configurational and interactive impacts of these causes on SCRs. First, a literature review was used to identify 35 causes, which were classified into 9 categories. Second, two rounds of questionnaire surveys and an expert interview within China’s construction sector were conducted for data collection. Then, fuzzy set qualitative comparative analysis (fsQCA) was used to identify the configurations of causes leading to SCRs. A fuzzy Bayesian network (FBN) model was subsequently developed to explore the causes’ interactions under different configurations. Finally, scenario analysis was conducted by the FBN model to identify the optimal SCRs management scenarios (MS). Results reveal two types of configurations of SCRs causes: process and network-oriented, and environment-oriented configurations, in which the environment causes, as well as information and partnerships causes, exhibit mutually substitutive effects in triggering SCRs. Also, the key causal paths triggering SCRs differ across those two configurations, with the former being mainly characterized by planning, procurement, and manufacturing-led paths, and the latter being characterized by environment-led paths. Moreover, addressing the same risk cause in different configurations demonstrates heterogeneous effects on SCRs prevention. In addition, tackling risk causes located in multiple positions (root and non-root nodes) in the FBN model proves to be more effective than focusing on those located in a single position in SCRs prevention. By innovatively integrating both configuration and interaction perspectives to explore the causes leading to SCRs and their interrelationships, this study not only enhances the configuration understanding of SCRs formation in PC, but also quantitatively reveals the heterogeneous influence paths through which those causes collectively contribute to SCRs. The integration of fsQCA and FBN (fsQCA-FBN) framework developed in this study establishes a novel analytical paradigm that can be applied to other project-based industries for SCRs mitigation. Valuable implications for improving risk management effectiveness can also be drawn from the key causal paths and MS for industry practitioners to mitigate SCRs.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 调查导致预制建筑供应链风险的原因及其相互作用：配置视角
abstract_cn: 在预制建筑（PC）的网络化供应链中，额外的利益相关者和生产环境加剧了多种供应链风险（SCRs）及其复杂的相互作用。然而，现有研究主要集中在风险识别和评估上，对这些原因及其在不同配置中如何生成SCRs的探索相对有限。本研究开发了一种混合方法，以调查这些原因对SCRs的配置和互动影响。首先，通过文献综述识别了35个原因，并将其分类为9个类别。其次，在中国建筑行业进行了两轮问卷调查和专家访谈以收集数据。然后，采用模糊集定性比较分析（fsQCA）识别导致SCRs的原因配置。随后，开发了模糊贝叶斯网络（FBN）模型，以探讨不同配置下原因之间的相互作用。最后，通过FBN模型进行情景分析，以识别最佳的SCRs管理情景（MS）。结果揭示了两种类型的SCRs原因配置：以过程和网络为导向的配置，以及以环境为导向的配置，其中环境原因以及信息和伙伴关系原因在触发SCRs时表现出相互替代的效果。此外，触发SCRs的关键因果路径在这两种配置中有所不同，前者主要以规划、采购和制造为主导路径，后者则以环境为主导路径。此外，在不同配置中解决相同的风险原因对SCRs的预防表现出异质性效果。此外，处理位于模糊贝叶斯网络模型中多个位置（根节点和非根节点）的风险原因被证明比仅关注单一位置的风险原因在SCRs预防中更为有效。通过创新性地整合配置和互动视角来探讨导致SCRs的原因及其相互关系，本研究不仅增强了对PC中SCRs形成配置的理解，还定量揭示了这些原因共同对SCRs产生异质性影响路径。研究中开发的fsQCA和FBN（fsQCA-FBN）框架建立了一种新的分析范式，可应用于其他基于项目的行业以减轻SCRs。行业从业者可以从关键因果路径和管理情景中获得有价值的启示，以提高风险管理的有效性，从而减轻SCRs。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Key Competencies Necessary for Advancing Human–Wearable Robot Interactions in the Construction Industry: A Systematic Review
abstract: Wearable robots have been proposed as a potential solution to the growing problem of work-related musculoskeletal disorders (WMSDs) in the construction industry. However, significant barriers to wearable robot adoption exists, specifically a lack of training programs to sufficiently train the workforce and a lack of clearly defined competency frameworks for workforce readiness. As a result, this study presents a comprehensive Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta Analysis (PRIMSA)-compliant systematic literature review (SLR) of the key knowledge, skills, and abilities needed to implement human–wearable robot (HWR) interactions in the construction industry. A literature search was conducted using the Scopus academic database, which yielded 97 articles. All articles were subjected to a qualitative content analysis, and inclusion/exclusion criteria were applied, resulting in 61 articles to address the research objectives. The SLR findings revealed an increasing publication trend on HWR interactions between 2014 and 2024. Findings show that the majority of the studies were conducted across all continents, with the exception of Africa, where no relevant studies were identified. A total of 68 competencies were identified, categorized into knowledge (such as engineering principles and human-body mechanics) (32 competencies), skills (such as wearable robot operations and ergonomic evaluation) (20 competencies), and abilities (such as analytical thinking and adaptability) (16 competencies). To develop the identified competencies, a conceptual framework for advancing HWR interaction was designed. The framework suggests the need for professional and educational program reforms, as well as industry–academic collaboration, to develop competencies and advance HWR interactions. Finally, knowledge gaps in existing studies were identified, and recommendations were made for future research.
title_cn: 推动建筑行业人机可穿戴机器人交互所需的关键能力：系统性综述
abstract_cn: 可穿戴机器人被提议作为解决建筑行业日益严重的工作相关肌肉骨骼疾病（WMSDs）问题的潜在方案。然而，现存的可穿戴机器人采纳面临重大障碍，尤其是缺乏足够培训劳动力的培训项目，以及缺乏明确的能力框架以确保劳动力的准备就绪。因此，本研究呈现了一项符合系统评价与荟萃分析首选报告项目（PRIMSA）标准的系统文献综述（SLR），重点探讨在建筑行业实施人机可穿戴机器人（HWR）交互所需的关键知识、技能和能力。通过使用Scopus学术数据库进行文献检索，共获得97篇文章。所有文章均经过定性内容分析，并应用了纳入/排除标准，最终筛选出61篇文章以满足研究目标。SLR的结果显示，2014年至2024年间，HWR交互的出版趋势呈上升态势。研究发现，大多数研究在除非洲外的所有大洲进行，但在非洲未发现相关研究。共识别出68项能力，分为知识（如工程原理和人体力学）（32项能力）、技能（如可穿戴机器人操作和人机工程评估）（20项能力）和能力（如分析思维和适应能力）（16项能力）。为发展识别出的能力，设计了一个推进HWR交互的概念框架。该框架建议进行专业和教育项目改革，以及行业与学术界的合作，以发展能力并推进HWR交互。最后，识别了现有研究中的知识空白，并提出了未来研究的建议。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: A Low-Cost Automatic Indoor Measurement Device with Multisensor Fusion
abstract: Indoor measurement has always been an important process of indoor acceptance, such as the measurement of room structure (depth, bay, height, and wall flatness). Traditionally, these quality assessments rely on manual labor, which is highly subjective and variable. Consequently, automated devices such as terrestrial laser scanners (TLS) have been increasingly adopted for this task, but they cannot be widely used in indoor measurement due to limitations such as high price, poor interpretability, and single sensor. This paper presents a novel low-cost multisensor-based indoor measurement device to compensate for these shortcomings. This research includes: (1) unique mechanical design that transforms sensor information into sparse 3D point cloud data (PCD); (2) plane segmentation based on sparse point cloud; and (3) window opening measurement based on edge detection in dynamic background and monocular camera self-calibration. The reliability of this device was verified through experiments, and the results demonstrated that the device can realize high-precision indoor measurements in less than 5 min for one room.
title_cn: 一种低成本的自动室内测量设备，采用多传感器融合技术
abstract_cn: 室内测量一直是室内验收的重要过程，例如房间结构（深度、间距、高度和墙面平整度）的测量。传统上，这些质量评估依赖于人工劳动，具有高度的主观性和变异性。因此，地面激光扫描仪（TLS）等自动化设备在这一任务中逐渐被采用，但由于高昂的价格、较差的可解释性和单一传感器等限制，它们在室内测量中的应用仍然受到限制。本文提出了一种新型的低成本多传感器室内测量设备，以弥补这些不足。该研究包括：（1）独特的机械设计，将传感器信息转化为稀疏的三维点云数据（PCD）；（2）基于稀疏点云的平面分割；以及（3）基于动态背景中的边缘检测和单目相机自标定的窗户开口测量。通过实验验证了该设备的可靠性，结果表明该设备能够在不到5分钟的时间内实现对一个房间的高精度室内测量。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: A Three-Stage Intelligent Crack Detection Method for Concrete Bridges Based on Deep Neural Networks
title_cn: 一种基于深度神经网络的混凝土桥梁三阶段智能裂缝检测方法

title: Contract Management of BIM-Based Projects in the Brazilian Public Sector: Contractors’ and Owners’ Perspectives
abstract: Building information modeling (BIM) is currently a prevalent approach for a new way of managing the design, construction, operation, and maintenance of a project. In this context this study investigates how contract management can be better aligned with BIM-based public construction projects in Brazil, emphasizing the potential of agile-inspired mechanisms to address the limitations of traditional contractual frameworks. A qualitative approach was adopted, using semistructured interviews with public-sector professionals and private contractors to examine BIM applications, organizational practices, and the integration of BIM into contract management. The findings reveal persistent gaps, including vague contractual clauses, fragmented responsibilities, limited use of common data environments (CDEs), and insufficient institutional capacity. Based on these insights, the study proposes the following practical recommendations for public-sector contract managers: embedding explicit BIM clauses, mandating CDE use, clarifying roles and approval workflows, adopting modular contracting where feasible, investing in training, and pursuing regulatory adjustments. A three-layer conceptual framework is developed, linking BIM functionalities, contract management activities, and agile-oriented recommendations, highlighting how digital processes reshape contractual requirements and how adaptive strategies can enhance efficiency, transparency, and collaboration. The research offers both theoretical and practical contributions. Theoretically, by connecting BIM and agile concepts to contract management, and practically, by providing guidance for more integrated and adaptive public procurement practices.
title_cn: 巴西公共部门基于BIM项目的合同管理：承包商与业主的视角
abstract_cn: 建筑信息建模（BIM）目前是一种广泛应用的新方法，用于管理项目的设计、施工、运营和维护。在此背景下，本研究探讨了如何更好地将合同管理与巴西基于BIM的公共建设项目对接，强调了灵感来源于敏捷方法的机制在解决传统合同框架局限性方面的潜力。研究采用定性方法，通过对公共部门专业人士和私营承包商进行半结构化访谈，考察BIM应用、组织实践以及BIM在合同管理中的整合。研究结果揭示了持续存在的差距，包括模糊的合同条款、分散的责任、有限的公共数据环境（CDE）使用以及不足的机构能力。基于这些见解，研究提出了以下针对公共部门合同管理者的实用建议：嵌入明确的BIM条款、强制使用CDE、明确角色和审批工作流程、在可行的情况下采用模块化合同、投资培训以及寻求监管调整。研究开发了一个三层概念框架，将BIM功能、合同管理活动和以敏捷为导向的建议联系起来，突显数字化流程如何重塑合同要求，以及适应性策略如何提升效率、透明度和协作。该研究提供了理论和实践上的贡献。从理论上看，通过将BIM和敏捷概念与合同管理相连接；从实践上看，为更为综合和适应性的公共采购实践提供指导。

title: Occupational injuries and workplace assaults among migrant workers in Victoria, Australia: a study of emergency department presentations
title_cn: 维多利亚州澳大利亚移民工人的职业伤害和工作场所袭击：急诊科就诊情况研究

title: MRDenseNet: automated building damage detection model after the earthquake with a combination-based deep feature engineering
title_cn: MRDenseNet：一种基于组合深度特征工程的自动化地震后建筑损伤检测模型

title: Emergency management and social vulnerability in climate adaptation: the case of public safety power shutoffs
title_cn: 气候适应中的应急管理与社会脆弱性：公共安全停电案例分析

title: From association to Explanation: Causal explanation of Rework-Related safety events using Evidential Pluralism
title_cn: 从关联到解释：利用证据多元主义对返工相关安全事件的因果解释

title: Analysing aviation safety reports for uncovering current risks and policy gaps using topic modelling and knowledge graphs
abstract: • We leverage NLP and LLM to analyse aviation safety investigation reports. • Develop an integrated framework combining topic modelling and knowledge graph analysis. • Identify key safety concerns, including helicopter operations, weather factors, and engine failure. • Provide insight into current aviation safety issues in Australia. • Consider future challenges, including climate change and advanced air mobility. This paper analyses air transport safety investigation reports to reveal region-specific aviation safety hazards and identify current and potential future environmental, regulatory and operational risk factors. We present a novel framework that leverages advanced natural language processing (NLP) and large language model (LLM) techniques, using topic modelling and knowledge graphs for the analysis of said investigation safety reports. A key objective is to pinpoint safety issues in Australian aviation through deployment of an optimised BERTopic approach for topic modelling. An LLM is further used for entity extraction and knowledge graph construction to map relationships between safety factors. Our results reveal 22 distinct clusters, achieving a superior coherence score of 0.58 compared to conventional models, and by incorporating knowledge graph analysis, we better reveal the complex interdependencies between different safety factors. By mapping the outcomes of the proposed framework to well-known aviation safety models, we provide early signals of risks that may become critical in the future, including advanced air mobility and more extreme weather conditions. This positions our framework as diagnostic, enabling investigators to better understand safety factor interdependencies, identify risk concentrations, and enhance preparedness for evolving aviation operational contexts.
title_cn: 利用主题建模和知识图谱分析航空安全报告，以揭示当前风险和政策缺口
abstract_cn:
• 我们利用自然语言处理（NLP）和大型语言模型（LLM）分析航空安全调查报告。  
• 开发一个结合主题建模和知识图谱分析的综合框架。  
• 识别关键安全问题，包括直升机操作、天气因素和发动机故障。  
• 提供对澳大利亚当前航空安全问题的洞察。  
• 考虑未来挑战，包括气候变化和先进空中出行。  

本文分析了航空运输安全调查报告，以揭示特定地区的航空安全隐患，并识别当前及潜在的未来环境、监管和操作风险因素。我们提出了一个新颖的框架，利用先进的自然语言处理（NLP）和大型语言模型（LLM）技术，通过主题建模和知识图谱分析上述调查安全报告。一个关键目标是通过优化的BERTopic方法进行主题建模，明确澳大利亚航空中的安全问题。此外，还使用LLM进行实体提取和知识图谱构建，以绘制安全因素之间的关系。我们的结果揭示了22个不同的聚类，获得了0.58的优越一致性得分，相较于传统模型更具优势，并通过结合知识图谱分析，更好地揭示了不同安全因素之间复杂的相互依赖关系。通过将所提框架的结果与知名航空安全模型进行映射，我们提供了未来可能变得关键的风险的早期信号，包括先进空中出行和更极端的天气条件。这使我们的框架具备诊断能力，帮助调查人员更好地理解安全因素之间的相互依赖，识别风险集中区域，并增强对不断变化的航空操作环境的应对能力。

title: Decoding crash narratives: a comparative evaluation of large language models for accident cause classification
title_cn: 解码事故叙事：大型语言模型在事故原因分类中的比较评估

title: From Safety-I myths to the improbable normal: reflections on Hollnagel’s legacy in safety practice
title_cn: 从安全第一的神话到不太可能的常态：对霍尔纳格尔在安全实践中遗产的反思

title: Pedestrian level wind assessment of historic urban forms: A study of Massawa, Eritrea
abstract: Pedestrian-level wind comfort and safety are essential considerations in promoting urban comfort for shaping the quality of the urban environment. Assessment of pedestrian wind environments is, however, typically associated with modern urban development areas, with limited application in historic contexts despite their embedded wisdom in climate responsive building design and city planning. Moreover, there is a limitation in accounting for the effects of comprehensive planning and the combined influence of different morphological factors, with emphasis commonly limited to building scales in most studies. This research examines the impact of urban form and building design on the pedestrian wind environment in the historic port city of Massawa, Eritrea. Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulations were conducted on six models representing the evolution of urban forms over nearly 150 years to understand their effect on the pedestrian wind environment. Simulations were conducted for each model in two prevailing wind directions, with a particular focus on velocity amplification analysis to understand the design-related contributions comparatively. Results mainly show that organic urban forms created less wind activity in the core of the city, with high wind acceleration mostly related to buildings in the windward direction. In contrast, gridded urban forms with broad and straight street corridors create a channeling effect, creating more areas of potential wind discomfort in the core of the city. Thus, highlighting the need for future microclimate studies to understand microclimate differences in different urban forms informed by varying underlying factors. • Pedestrian-level wind environment study was conducted in a historic heritage site. • Six models representing urban form change over nearly 150 years were studied. • Organic urban forms created less wind activity in the core of the city. • Gridded urban forms with broad and straight street corridors increase wind activity. • Destruction of heritage causes loss of heritage and alters the wind flow patterns.
title_cn: 历史城市形态的行人级风环境评估：厄立特里亚马萨瓦的研究
abstract_cn: 行人级别的风舒适性和安全性是促进城市舒适度、塑造城市环境质量的重要考虑因素。然而，行人风环境的评估通常与现代城市开发区域相关，在历史背景下的应用有限，尽管这些历史背景中蕴含了气候响应建筑设计和城市规划的智慧。此外，在综合规划的影响和不同形态因素的综合影响方面存在局限性，大多数研究通常只关注建筑尺度。本研究考察了厄立特里亚历史港口城市马萨瓦的城市形态和建筑设计对行人风环境的影响。对六个模型进行了计算流体动力学（CFD）模拟，这些模型代表了近150年来城市形态的演变，以理解它们对行人风环境的影响。每个模型在两种主导风向下进行了模拟，特别关注风速放大分析，以比较设计相关的贡献。结果主要表明，有机城市形态在城市核心区域产生的风活动较少，而高风加速主要与迎风方向的建筑有关。相比之下，具有宽阔且笔直街道走廊的网格化城市形态则产生了引导效应，导致城市核心区域出现更多潜在的风不适区域。因此，强调未来微气候研究的必要性，以了解不同城市形态中受不同潜在因素影响的微气候差异。 • 在历史遗产地进行了行人级别风环境研究。 • 研究了六个代表近150年来城市形态变化的模型。 • 有机城市形态在城市核心区域产生的风活动较少。 • 具有宽阔且笔直街道走廊的网格化城市形态增加了风活动。 • 遗产的破坏导致遗产的丧失并改变了风流模式。

title: How natural–built environments shape spatiotemporal patterns of urban heat islands: Integrating water-gradient stratification and machine learning
title_cn: 自然与人工环境如何塑造城市热岛的时空模式：整合水梯度分层与机器学习
